---
title: "Robert Kimutai"
description: "Engineer, Data Scientist, Researcher, and Developer building end-to-end systems that solve real problems."
image: assets/images/profile_pic.jpg
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <div id="particles-js"></div>
  <h1>Robert Kimutai</h1>
  <div class="typed-tagline"><span id="typed-tagline"></span></div>
  <p class="hero-bio">I design and build end-to-end systems at the intersection of engineering, data science, and sustainable development - from a national health insurance platform architected for 54M citizens to IoT sensor networks that cost $100 instead of $10,000.</p>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="stat" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="0">
      <span class="stat-number" data-target="3" data-suffix="">0</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Full-Stack Systems</span>
    </div>
    <div class="stat" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">
      <span class="stat-number" data-target="28" data-suffix="">0</span>
      <span class="stat-label">API Endpoints</span>
    </div>
    <div class="stat" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="200">
      <span class="stat-number" data-target="54" data-suffix="M">0M</span>
      <span class="stat-label">Citizens Targeted</span>
    </div>
    <div class="stat" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300">
      <span class="stat-number" data-target="100" data-prefix="$">$0</span>
      <span class="stat-label">IoT Unit Cost</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-cta">
    <a href="portfolio/index.html" class="btn-primary-custom">View My Work</a>
    <a href="resume/index.html" class="btn-outline-custom">Resume</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="content-section">
  <h2 class="section-heading" data-aos="fade-up">Featured Projects</h2>
  <p class="section-subheading" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">End-to-end systems I've designed and built.</p>
  <div class="projects-grid">
    <div class="project-card tilt-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="0">
      <div class="project-card-icon" style="font-size: 2.5rem;">&#x1F3E5;</div>
      <div class="project-card-body">
        <div class="metric">Designed for 54M Citizens &bull; 28 Endpoints <span class="private-badge">Private Repo</span></div>
        <h3><a href="portfolio/sha-system.html">SHA Integrated Health System</a></h3>
        <p>Full-stack health insurance platform for Kenya's Social Health Authority - claims adjudication, ML fraud detection, spatial analytics, and a bilingual React PWA.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">R</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Plumber API</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Golem/Shiny</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">React</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">PostgreSQL</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">PostGIS</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">Docker</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card tilt-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="150">
      <div class="project-card-icon" style="font-size: 2.5rem;">&#x1F3DB;</div>
      <div class="project-card-body">
        <div class="metric">11 Modules &bull; 30 Wards <span class="private-badge">Private Repo</span></div>
        <h3><a href="portfolio/smartlicensync.html">SmartLicenSync - Revenue Optimizer</a></h3>
        <p>Business permit and license management system for Kericho County Government - digitizing registration, payments, compliance, and spatial mapping.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">R</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Golem/Shiny</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">PostgreSQL</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">PostGIS</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">M-Pesa</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">Docker</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card tilt-card" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300">
      <div class="project-card-icon" style="font-size: 2.5rem;">&#9728;&#65039;</div>
      <div class="project-card-body">
        <div class="metric">Sub-$100 &bull; ASAE S580.1 <span class="private-badge">Private Repo</span></div>
        <h3><a href="portfolio/solar-cooker.html">Solar Cooker IoT Testing Platform</a></h3>
        <p>MSc thesis - open-source IoT data acquisition unit replacing $10K+ lab equipment. ESP32 sensors, custom PCB, Python simulation pipeline, R Shiny dashboard.</p>
        <div class="tech-tags">
          <span class="tech-tag">ESP32</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Python</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">R Shiny</span>
          <span class="tech-tag green">Plumber API</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">KiCad</span>
          <span class="tech-tag orange">PySpice</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="skills-section" data-aos="fade-up">
  <h2 class="section-heading">Technical Skills</h2>
  <div class="skill-category" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="0">
    <h3>AI/ML &amp; Data Science</h3>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag primary">R</span>
      <span class="skill-tag primary">Python</span>
      <span class="skill-tag primary">tidymodels</span>
      <span class="skill-tag primary">XGBoost</span>
      <span class="skill-tag primary">Isolation Forest</span>
      <span class="skill-tag primary">DALEX</span>
      <span class="skill-tag primary">ggplot2</span>
      <span class="skill-tag primary">Feature Engineering</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-category" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">
    <h3>Systems &amp; Software Engineering</h3>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag green">Golem/Shiny</span>
      <span class="skill-tag green">Plumber REST API</span>
      <span class="skill-tag green">React / TypeScript</span>
      <span class="skill-tag green">PostgreSQL / PostGIS</span>
      <span class="skill-tag green">Docker</span>
      <span class="skill-tag green">JWT / RBAC</span>
      <span class="skill-tag green">Git / GitHub Actions</span>
      <span class="skill-tag green">HTML / CSS / JS</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-category" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="200">
    <h3>Hardware &amp; IoT</h3>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag orange">ESP32 / Arduino</span>
      <span class="skill-tag orange">KiCad PCB Design</span>
      <span class="skill-tag orange">Proteus 8</span>
      <span class="skill-tag orange">PySpice / LTspice</span>
      <span class="skill-tag orange">Sensor Systems</span>
      <span class="skill-tag orange">MicroPython</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-category" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300">
    <h3>Data, Reporting &amp; Research</h3>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Quarto / R Markdown</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">LaTeX</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Excel</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Zotero</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Reproducible Pipelines</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Technical Report Writing</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Plotly / Leaflet</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-category" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="400">
    <h3>Domain &amp; Engineering</h3>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Sustainability Modeling</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Hydrological Modeling (ArcSWAT)</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">QGIS</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">AutoCAD</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Impact Analysis</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Experimental Design</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Systems Thinking</span>
      <span class="skill-tag accent">Process Automation</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="contact-section" data-aos="fade-up">
  <h2>Let's Work Together</h2>
  <p>I'm available for engineering roles, research collaborations, data science consulting, and custom software development.</p>
  <div class="contact-links">
    <a href="mailto:robert.kimutai.ds@gmail.com" class="contact-link email">Email Me</a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-kimutai-921608330/" class="contact-link linkedin">Connect on LinkedIn</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
